beginner.title: Conjunctions: and, but, or, so, because
beginner.content:
📌 And – Thêm thông tin tương đồng
Dùng and để nối các thông tin hoặc ý tưởng tương đồng, có nghĩa là ‘cũng’ hoặc ‘ngoài ra’.
• My brother is a plumber, and my sister is a teacher.
• They have an apartment in the city and a little house in the countryside.

Khi nối các câu, không cần lặp lại chủ ngữ.
• She got up and left. (=She got up and she left.)
• He was looking at us and smiling. (=He was looking at us and he was smiling.)
📌 But – Thêm thông tin đối lập
Dùng but để nối các thông tin đối lập, tức là thông tin khác biệt.
• I studied a lot, but I failed the exam.
• He is good but not the best.
📌 Or – Nối các lựa chọn
Dùng or để nối các khả năng khác nhau.
• Would you like to go to the swimming pool or to the beach?
• He can go to a hotel or stay with us.

Dùng or (KHÔNG dùng and) trong câu phủ định để chỉ ‘không phải cái này và cũng không phải cái kia’.
❌ I don’t like oranges and lemons.
✅ I don’t like oranges or lemons.
⚠️ Dùng and, but, or để nối các từ hoặc cụm từ tương đồng về ngữ pháp
Các thành phần được nối bởi and, but, or phải cùng loại ngữ pháp. Tránh các lỗi phổ biến:
❌ I like dancing and sing. → ✅ I like dancing and singing. (-ing verb and -ing verb)
❌ Would you like to go to the beach or having an ice cream in the park? → ✅ Would you like to go to the beach or to have an ice cream in the park? (to-infinitive and to-infinitive)
📌 So – Chỉ kết quả
Dùng so để giới thiệu kết quả hoặc hậu quả của một điều gì đó. Phần thứ hai của câu là kết quả của phần đầu tiên.
• It was cold, so I turned on the heating.
• I spent three hours at the gym, so I’m really tired now.
📌 Because – Chỉ lý do
Dùng because để giới thiệu lý do cho một điều gì đó.
• I turned on the heating because it was cold.
• I’m speaking quietly because I don’t want to wake up the baby.
I like coffee and tea.Tôi thích cà phê và trà.
She is rich but unhappy.Cô ấy giàu nhưng không hạnh phúc.
Do you want to eat out or cook at home?Bạn muốn ăn ngoài hay nấu ăn ở nhà?
It was raining, so I took an umbrella.Trời mưa, nên tôi đã mang ô.
I stayed home because I was sick.Tôi ở nhà vì tôi bị ốm.

exercises.q: I like apples ___ bananas.
exercises.exp: Nối hai danh từ tương đồng

exercises.q: She is smart ___ she is lazy.
Do you want coffee ___ tea?
It was cold, ___ I closed the window.
I stayed home ___ I was tired.
He can sing ___ dance.
exercises.exp: Nối hai động từ tương đồng

exercises.q: The movie was long ___ interesting.
exercises.exp: Nối hai tính từ đối lập

exercises.q: Is it Monday ___ Tuesday today?
I was hungry, ___ I made a sandwich.
She is happy ___ she won the prize.
He is tall ___ strong.
exercises.exp: Nối hai tính từ tương đồng

exercises.q: I want to go out ___ it's raining.
You can pay by cash ___ credit card.
I missed the bus, ___ I was late for work.
We went to the beach ___ the weather was nice.
She bought a dress ___ a hat.
exercises.exp: Nối hai danh từ tương đồng

exercises.q: He tried hard ___ he didn't succeed.
Do you prefer reading ___ watching TV?
I was tired, ___ I went to bed early.
They are learning English ___ they want to travel.
I like pizza ___ pasta.
exercises.exp: Nối hai danh từ tương đồng

exercises.q: He is rich ___ he is not happy.
Is it hot ___ cold outside?
She was sick, ___ she didn't go to school.
I eat vegetables ___ they are healthy.
He plays football ___ basketball.
exercises.exp: Nối hai danh từ tương đồng

exercises.q: The car is old ___ it runs well.
Do you want to stay home ___ go out?
It was dark, ___ I turned on the light.
She cried ___ she was sad.
I have a dog ___ a cat.
exercises.exp: Nối hai danh từ tương đồng

exercises.q: He is young ___ very responsible.
Should I wear a coat ___ a jacket?
I studied hard, ___ I passed the exam.
They are learning Spanish ___ they live in Spain.
She likes reading ___ writing.
exercises.exp: Nối hai động từ -ing tương đồng

exercises.q: The food was delicious ___ expensive.
exercises.exp: Nối hai tính từ đối lập

exercises.q: Do you want to walk ___ take a bus?
exercises.exp: Nối hai động từ nguyên mẫu tương đồng

exercises.q: He was thirsty, ___ he drank some water.
I love my job ___ it's challenging.

reorder.words: I like coffee and tea
She is smart but lazy
Do you want coffee or tea
It was cold so I closed the window
I stayed home because I was tired
He can sing and dance
The movie was long but interesting
Is it Monday or Tuesday today
I was hungry so I made a sandwich
She is happy because she won the prize
He is tall and strong
I want to go out but it's raining
You can pay by cash or credit card
I missed the bus so I was late for work
We went to the beach because the weather was nice
She bought a dress and a hat
He tried hard but he didn't succeed
Do you prefer reading or watching TV
I was tired so I went to bed early
They are learning English because they want to travel

passage.text: My name is Anna. I like to read books {{1}} listen to music. I want to go to university {{2}} I need to study hard. Sometimes I feel tired {{3}} I always try my best. After class, I usually meet my friends {{4}} we go to the library. We can study there {{5}} we can talk about our homework. I don't like noisy places {{6}} I prefer quiet ones. I love learning English {{7}} it is very useful for my future. I want to travel the world {{8}} meet new people. I also want to learn about different cultures {{9}} traditions. I think it's important to be open-minded {{10}} understand others.

John is a student {{1}} he also works part-time. He studies in the morning {{2}} works in the afternoon. He is often tired {{3}} he needs money for his studies. He wants to buy a new laptop {{4}} he is saving money. He can buy a cheap one {{5}} he can wait for a better one. He likes to play sports {{6}} he doesn't have much time. He plays football on Sundays {{7}} he goes swimming on Saturdays. He is a very active person {{8}} he always finds time for his hobbies. He wants to be successful {{9}} he works hard. He believes that hard work brings good results {{10}} he never gives up.

My family went on a trip last summer. We visited the beach {{1}} the mountains. The weather was sunny {{2}} hot. We swam in the sea {{3}} played in the sand. My brother wanted to go hiking {{4}} my sister preferred relaxing. We decided to do both {{5}} we had enough time. We ate a lot of seafood {{6}} it was delicious. We took many photos {{7}} we wanted to remember the trip. We were tired at the end of the day {{8}} we were very happy. We plan to go again next year {{9}} we love traveling {{10}} exploring new places.

I woke up late this morning {{1}} I missed my breakfast. I ran to the bus stop {{2}} the bus had already left. I was sad {{3}} I decided to walk. The walk was long {{4}} I enjoyed the fresh air. I arrived at school {{5}} the lesson had started. My teacher was not angry {{6}} she understood. I promised to be on time tomorrow {{7}} I don't want to miss anything. I will set my alarm earlier {{8}} I will go to bed earlier. It's important to be punctual {{9}} it shows respect {{10}} responsibility.

My friend Peter is very kind {{1}} helpful. He always helps me with my homework {{2}} he explains difficult things. He is good at maths {{3}} he is not very good at English. He wants to improve his English {{4}} he practices every day. He reads books {{5}} watches English movies. He asks many questions {{6}} he wants to understand. He is a hard worker {{7}} he will surely succeed. I admire him a lot {{8}} he is a good role model. We often study together {{9}} we help each other. We are good friends {{10}} we share many interests.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về sở thích của bạn, dùng 'and' để nối các sở thích tương đồng.
writing_prompts.example: I have many hobbies. I like reading books and listening to music. I also enjoy playing sports and watching movies. In my free time, I often go for a walk and take photos. I think hobbies are important because they help us relax and learn new things.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một tình huống bạn muốn làm gì đó nhưng không thể, dùng 'but'.
writing_prompts.example: Today I wanted to go out with my friends, but it's raining heavily. I also wanted to watch a movie, but I have to study for my exam. I feel a bit sad, but I know studying is important. I hope I can go out tomorrow, but I will check the weather first.

writing_prompts.vi: Đưa ra các lựa chọn cho một hoạt động cuối tuần, dùng 'or'.
writing_prompts.example: This weekend, I can go to the park or visit a museum. If I stay home, I can read a book or watch TV. I might also cook a new recipe or order food online. I need to decide soon, or I will waste my day. What do you think I should do, or what would you choose?

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một sự kiện và kết quả của nó, dùng 'so'.
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday, I studied hard for my English exam, so I felt confident. I passed the exam with a good score, so I was very happy. After that, I was hungry, so I made a big sandwich. It was a nice day, so I went for a walk in the park. I enjoyed the fresh air, so I felt refreshed.

writing_prompts.vi: Giải thích lý do bạn thích một môn học hoặc hoạt động, dùng 'because'.
writing_prompts.example: I like learning English because it's very useful for my future career. I also enjoy drawing because it's a relaxing activity. I like playing badminton because it helps me stay healthy. I love spending time with my family because they always support me. I think it's important to have hobbies because they make our lives more interesting.
